title: Module 5: DOM Manipulation
description: HTML ko JavaScript se control karna.

chapters.title: 1. What is DOM?
chapters.content: DOM (Document Object Model) aapke HTML page ka ek naksha (map) hai. JavaScript is nakshay ko padh kar page badal sakti hai.

chapters.title: 2. Selecting Elements
chapters.content:
Element ko pakadne ke tareeke:

  • getElementById('id'): ID se pakdo.
  • querySelector('.class'): Class ya Tag se pakdo.

chapters.title: 3. Events
chapters.content:
Jab user kuch karta hai (Click, Type, Mouse Move), use Event kehte hain.

addEventListener('click', function) sabse badhiya tareeka hai.
